title_en: EMLTerm whose eval is i (imaginary unit)
informal_pl: Istnieje term EML (po przeniesieniu na ℂ) rozmiaru 131 ewaluujący do jednostki urojonej i. PROBABLE PERMANENT SORRY: wymaga zarówno wersji zespolonej EMLTerm jak i transkrypcji 131-węzłowego drzewa.
informal_en: There exists an EML term (after lifting to ℂ) of size 131 evaluating to i. PROBABLE PERMANENT SORRY: requires both a complex variant of EMLTerm and transcription of the 131-node tree.
lean_target_signature: theorem emlterm_for_i : ∃ t : EMLTermℂ, EMLTermℂ.eval t = Complex.I := by sorry
notes: Permanent sorry; the complex variant EMLTermℂ is not formally introduced in the chunks. The target is recorded for the eventual complex-EML pass.
